title: solanum urbanum var. typicum
intro: Solanum urbanum var. typicum, also known as the Woodland Bitter Nightshade, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum urbanum var. typicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a bitter tonic, and can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused oil.
